name: smo-ai-brain
description: SMO-AI Brain Context Plugin (Phase 2). Converts a locked Phase 1 input folder into a customer's complete business brain at Class A: founder About-Me files, business Project files, and Claude Config files. Each project brain is self-contained and project-level (the founder's persona differs per business). Zero-hallucination, traceability-enforced (every brain claim cites its Phase 1 source). MENA-optimized bilingual EN/AR. Consumes smo-ai-onboarding Phase 1 output, produces 1-ProjectBrain/ ready for the customer Claude cockpit.
